title: MAP 6.13: Plan cold-start migration for runtime changes
description: Wave 1.5 from MAP 6.13 plan. Inventory current MAP state and write a migration rollout plan before shipping new runtime layers, so the project does not repeat repo-drift, two-copy, task-mirror, hcom-session, or CommandCenterUI state incidents. Read MAP_System/artifacts/planning/map-613-master-implementation-plan.md, MAP_System/shared/current-state.md, MAP_System/shared/canonical-repo.md, MAP_System/notes/git-setup.md, MAP_System/workflow/task_graph.json, MAP_System/agents/status.json, and Projects/Pathwell routing notes before writing.
acceptance_criteria: Inventory names current canonical repo, SQLite/file mirrors, task graph, event log, hcom session state, helper notes, agent status, Pathwell/private project state, and CommandCenterUI assumptions.
Rollout plan includes order of operations, freeze/lock points, rollback points, validation commands, operator checkpoints, and do-not-proceed gates.
Smoke-check artifact lists pre/post validation commands for canonical path, task mirrors, event baseline, agent status, and CommandCenterUI state.
